---
name: Bug report
about: Report a crash, glitch, or any other issue with the mod.
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: arcade-smasher

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen without the bug.

**Please ensure:**
 - You have listed your Minecraft version somewhere in this bug report.
 - You are using the latest version of Windowlogging.
 - You are using the latest version of the Fabric Loader.
 - You are using the latest version of Fabric API.

If the requirements listed above are not met, please give a valid reason as to why, otherwise the bug report may be closed.
